candidates.why: This appears in the current-liabilities section and represents current borrowings/short-term debt; preferred because the candidate total line is blank.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist contextually: the current-section 'Liabilities to credit institutions' is the best available non-lease short-term debt line. Excluded 'Lease liabilities' per rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for current taxes payable.
Tax-related but VAT/payroll-style operating tax liability is not the preferred income taxes payable measure for TXP.

Likely only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
